description: A portrait-format graphic with two darkened side-by-side booking-style portraits of two young men across the top. Large white serif text below reads ILLEGAL ALIEN, then MURDERERS on a red bar, then an italic line reading offered 5-year plea deal by the and FAIRFAX DISTRICT ATTORNEY. A small Department of Homeland Security seal sits at the bottom.
notable_text: ILLEGAL ALIEN MURDERERS offered 5-year plea deal by the FAIRFAX DISTRICT ATTORNEY
